# Bengal Ledger APK

Download the Bengal Ledger APK, an offline Android SMS finance ledger that parses transaction messages into a local ledger with CSV export.

Download: https://tanzir71.github.io/android-apk-landing-pages/bengal-ledger/assets/bengal-ledger.apk
Canonical: https://tanzir71.github.io/android-apk-landing-pages/bengal-ledger/
Author: Tanzir Rahman, https://tanziro.com
Package: bengalledger.offline.sms
Version: 1.0.2+3
APK size: 49.44 MB
SHA256: 0fc40d0a1ce7b7a6692e14b36148d3e36d50fdde3f29f760181d4013d08001e5

Important: This APK is vibe-coded, has limited testing, and ships with no warranty. Users should read the permissions and install at their own risk.
